title: Kleeper
description: Optifine resource pack that change creeper into Klee
body:
This pack requires optifine to function properly

gUESS wHo's bACk

This pack contains:

✔ Remodeled creeper based on Klee from Genshin Impact
✔ Replaced "far" disc with Klee's Theme
✔ Replaced creeper's and explosion sound
✔ New Splash Text
✔ I forgor

Available Kleeper Voiceline

English ✔
Japanese ✔

Thanks for visiting/downloading! Any suggestions would be greatly appreciated
(btw if you name your creeper Creeper it will become normal creeper)

yes this is the same person as flurrry on pmc
